description_long: This is a charming, small bakery building with a steeply pitched, reddish-tiled roof and cream-colored stucco walls accented by stone blocks at the corners. The front features a wooden arched door and window, with a red-and-orange striped awning shading a small market stall area displaying baskets, crates, and sacks, suggesting fresh produce or baked goods for sale. A stone archway marks the entrance to the property, and several wooden barrels and crates are arranged along the side, enhancing the rustic, old-world ambiance. The ground is paved with irregular stone tiles, and the building sits on a raised, cutaway platform. The rear of the building is plain, with no windows or doors, and the side view reveals the depth of the structure and the overhanging roof. The overall design evokes a quaint, European village bakery, blending functional commercial space with inviting, decorative elements.
description: A quaint, rustic bakery with a red-tiled roof, cream stucco walls, a striped awning, and a small market stall under a stone archway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched door, window, striped awning, market stall, and stone archway entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building, the overhanging roof, and barrels and crates along the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, windowless back wall and the full height of the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the stone archway and the side of the building with the tiled roof.
attribute_awning_with_bakery_branding: There is a red-and-orange striped fabric awning above the storefront, but it does not feature any visible bakery branding, logos, text, or patterns beyond the stripes.
attribute_architectural_style: Rustic European village style, characterized by a steeply pitched tiled roof, stucco walls with stone accents, arched windows and doors, and a decorative market stall under a striped awning.
